name: Roasted Duckling W/Apple Sesame Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Instant minced onion (or Use onion powder)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the ducks inside and out, then pat dry.
2. Cook giblets in water to make stock.
3. Toast sesame seeds in a shallow pan at 350°F for 20 minutes.
4. Prepare stuffing mixes according to package instructions.
5. Add the remaining ingredients (celery, parsley, apples, salt, poultry seasoning, pepper, and toasted sesame seeds) to the stuffing mix and mix well.
6. Use hot stock to soak onion in (if using onion powder, add with other seasonings).
7. Stuff and truss the ducks.
8. Place the ducks in an open roasting pan without water.
9. Roast uncovered at 350°F for 2-1/2 hours (25 to 30 minutes per pound).
10. Makes 8 servings.
